docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAMETRIA AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, MARTHA DBA CJ AUTO 76
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, DAMETRIA AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, MARTHA DBA CJ AUTO 76 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAMETRIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 WAIVED) SERVED JAN-28-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, MARTHA DBA CJ AUTO 76

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR, SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF SETTLEMENT IS FINALIZED, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S HUSBAND CARLOS LOPEZ APPEARS ON HER BEHALF. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
